candidate_check.description: Windows Server 2022 setting Domain member: Digitally sign secure channel data (when possible) must be configured to Enabled.

check_content_excerpt:
If the following registry value does not exist or is not configured as specified, this is a finding:

Registry Hive: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE
Registry Path: \SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Netlogon\Parameters\

Value Name: SignSecureChannel

Value Type: REG_DWORD
Value: 0x00000001 (1)
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Windows Settings >> Security Settings >> Local Policies >> Security Options >> Domain member: Digitally sign secure channel data (when possible) to "Enabled".
title: Windows Server 2022 setting Domain member: Digitally sign secure channel data (when possible) must be configured to Enabled.
